title: rosa coriifolia var. incanescens
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. incanescens, also known as the Himalayan rose or Tibetan rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential in treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Rosa coriifolia var. incanescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
